mutation_suggestions.suggestion: Introduce T/S/N substitutions at hydrophobic runs (≥3 consecutive AILMFWV). Target FR positions first, especially in FR2/FR3.
mutation_suggestions.rationale: Multiple aggregation motifs (>p95=2.0) predict high risk during manufacturing and storage.
